facebook.caption: Tucked away in the quieter Ông Lang area of Phu Quoc, Coco Palm Beach Resort & Spa earns its 4.4/5 from nearly a thousand guests for good reason. This is the kind of place where the pace slows down, the beach is never crowded, and the palm trees actually deliver on the shade. If you want a resort experience away from the busier southern beaches, Ông Lang is one of the best-kept secrets on the island. Practical tip: đường Đường Lê Thúc Nha is a bit tricky to find on first arrival, so screenshot the map before you lose signal on the road in.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the palms sway, the water sit glassy calm, and the crowds stay somewhere else entirely. Coco Palm Beach Resort & Spa in Ông Lang is what Phu Quoc looked like before the big resorts moved in, and it still feels that way. Rated 4.4/5 by close to a thousand visitors, this one clearly delivers.

instagram.caption: Less crowd, more palm. Coco Palm Beach Resort & Spa sits in the laid-back Ông Lang corner of Phu Quoc, rated 4.4/5 by nearly 1,000 guests. If a quieter beach stay is what you're after, this is your spot.
instagram.video_caption: Palms, calm water, and almost nobody else around. Coco Palm Beach Resort & Spa in Ông Lang is Phu Quoc at its most relaxed. Rated 4.4/5 and honestly, you can see why.

tiktok.caption: Quiet beach, tall palms, almost zero crowds. Coco Palm Beach Resort & Spa in Ông Lang is Phu Quoc's calmer side. 4.4/5 and worth every bit of it. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #BeachResort #OngLang

scenes: Pro tip: save the map offline

facebook.caption: Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc sits on the pristine shores of Bãi Dài, one of the longest and least crowded stretches of beach on the island, and with a 4.9/5 rating across more than 35,000 reviews, the praise is clearly no fluke. This is a full resort world unto itself, the kind of place where families, couples, and solo travelers all find something that feels made just for them. Come for the beach access, stay for every little detail in between. Tip: arriving early in the day gives you the best pick of activities before the afternoon crowds build.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the waves roll in on Bãi Dài as guests make the most of everything Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc has on offer. From the pools to the shoreline to the energy around the resort, these clips capture exactly why over 35,000 travelers have given this place a 4.9 out of 5.

instagram.caption: Bãi Dài beach, 35,821 five-star voices, and one resort that somehow lives up to all of them. Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc is the kind of place you plan a trip around. Tip: go early to make the most of your day.
instagram.video_caption: The beach is real, the vibes are real, and so is that 4.9/5 rating. Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc on Bãi Dài might just be Phu Quoc's most complete resort experience.

tiktok.caption: Bãi Dài beach + 35K glowing reviews = Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc living up to every single one. #PhuQuoc #VinpearlWonderworld #VietnamTravel #BeachResort

scenes: A resort built for every traveler.
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption: Novotel Phu Quoc Resort sits right on a palm-lined beach in Đường Bào, and with a 4.6/5 rating across more than 6,000 reviews, it consistently earns its reputation. Expect contemporary rooms and villas, several of which come with private pools, clean modern design, and direct beach access without the crowds of busier resort zones. The dry season from November to April is the sweet spot for a stay here. Practical tip: if you can stretch the budget, book a pool villa early since they sell out well ahead of peak season.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the afternoon light hit those private pool villas, palms swaying along the beachfront at Novotel Phu Quoc Resort. The clips show exactly why guests keep coming back, spacious layouts, that calm stretch of beach, and a vibe that feels genuinely relaxed rather than overcrowded. Pool villa bookings go fast in peak season, so plan ahead.

instagram.caption: Palm trees, private pools, and a beachfront location in Đường Bào. Novotel Phu Quoc Resort scores a well-earned 4.6/5 from over 6,000 guests. Best visited during dry season, November through April. Book pool villas early, they go fast.
instagram.video_caption: Private pool vibes, swaying palms, and a beach that actually feels peaceful. Novotel Phu Quoc Resort is giving everything. November to April is prime time, and yes, those pool villas book out quickly.

tiktok.caption: A private pool villa on a palm-lined beach in Phu Quoc? Yes please. Novotel Phu Quoc Resort rated 4.6/5 by 6k+ guests. Book early. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #BeachResort #PoolVilla

video_script.hook: Private pool. Palm beach. Phu Quoc.

facebook.caption: With a 4.9 out of 5 from nearly 800 reviews, MYLA SEAFOOD is one of the most-loved seafood spots on the island, and it's easy to see why. Sitting on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, right in the heart of Phu Quoc's main strip, this place brings the freshest local catch straight to your table. Whether you're after grilled clams, whole steamed fish, or a full spread of shellfish, this is the kind of meal you'll talk about long after you've left. Tip: it gets busy in the evenings, so arriving early or making a reservation saves you the wait.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the grill fire up and the seafood start arriving, platter after platter, at MYLA SEAFOOD on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Nearly 800 diners gave it a 4.9 out of 5, and the clips show exactly why. Fresh, generous portions and that buzz of a packed, happy restaurant. This one deserves a spot on your Phu Quoc dinner list.

instagram.caption: 4.9 stars. Nearly 800 reviews. MYLA SEAFOOD on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is earning every single one. Fresh local seafood, generous portions, and a lively atmosphere that just feels right on a Phu Quoc evening. Go early to beat the crowd.
instagram.video_caption: Platters of grilled shellfish, whole fish, and the smell of the ocean on the grill. MYLA SEAFOOD is the dinner spot Phu Quoc visitors keep coming back to. Rated 4.9 by nearly 800 guests.

tiktok.caption: 4.9 stars and nearly 800 reviews say it all. MYLA SEAFOOD is your must-do dinner in Phu Quoc. Go early, eat well. #PhuQuocFood #MYLASeafood #VietnamSeafood #PhuQuocEats #SeafoodLovers

scenes: Live catch, straight to the grill
Arrive early to get a seat

facebook.caption: With a 4.8/5 rating from 331 reviews, CHAO Cafe & Local Taste on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is clearly doing something right. This cozy spot blends good coffee with local Vietnamese flavors, making it a great place to slow down, sip something cold, and get a genuine taste of everyday Phu Quoc life. Whether you stop in for a morning pick-me-up or a lazy afternoon break, it fits the mood perfectly. Practical tip: it sits in Khu Phố 7, so drop the address into Google Maps before you head out.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the cups land on the table and you will understand why locals keep coming back. CHAO Cafe & Local Taste serves up coffee and Vietnamese bites in a setting that feels lived-in and real. No tourist-trap vibes here, just good drinks and good energy on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.

instagram.caption: 4.8 stars, 331 happy visitors, and one very good reason to wander down Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. CHAO Cafe & Local Taste is the kind of place that rewards curious travelers who step off the main strip.
instagram.video_caption: Steam rising, local flavors landing, and a laid-back vibe that is hard to leave. CHAO Cafe & Local Taste is your next Phu Quoc pit stop.

tiktok.caption: This little cafe on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo has 331 reviews and a 4.8 rating for good reason. CHAO Cafe & Local Taste is the real deal. #PhuQuoc #VietnamCafe #LocalEats #TravelVietnam
